title: Austin — goodbye list + apartment/job/gym + pack-out (2025)
html:
Austin — goodbye list + apartment/job/gym + pack-out (2025)

Source: 2025-08-21 Apple Note. The Austin-move command center: apartment locked, job locked, gym still open; explicit goodbye list of family members; brutal mom-acceptance line; ~3 weeks of pack-out.

TL;DR

  • Status check: Apartment locked. Job for Minecraft tools locked. Gym still open — narrowed to Lift ATX ($50/mo, $25 to start) vs. Iron Forge Gym TX ($55/mo, sauna). Lift ATX wins (later confirmed in 2025 12 Lift ATX feedback).
  • The hardest line: "I am also accepting the reality that my mom will have limited time in Austin." Said quietly mid-list; the mom house by the river long arc gets a hard mortality bookmark here.
  • Goodbye list — Grants Pass family / friends: Ann and Wayne, Tío Edgar, Las Dobles As, Grandpa Eddie / Karen, Kai, GSmitty, Vicente Palencia. Closing-the-Grants-Pass-chapter checklist.
  • Pack list specifics: mouth tape, lifting straps, cheap glasses, scissors, full body mirror, silicon ice trays. The Austin-Yahir aesthetic captured granularly.
  • Food-pantry pre-research: Micah 6 (West Campus, walkable), Hope Food Pantry (Central) — Yahir going in with the survival-lattice already mapped. Same no runway discipline as bridge income strategies elsewhere.
  • Cross-references: the 2025 07 self call meets execution here. The fraud-fear has flipped to logistics.
